hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then cd /home/user/Midas && uv run ruff format . && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff check . || { echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "ruff failed — fix lint/format errors before pushing"}'; exit 2; }; fi
